sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, I can see lines connecting the objects now! There are white lines connecting:
1. The top chain: dark gray diamond → orange square → dark gray ring (already connected)
2. A new line from the orange square going down to the purple square
3. A line from the purple square to the orange diamond at bottom
4. A line from the orange diamond going up
The white diamond has moved to the orange diamond position at the bottom. The lines suggest the path is being traced. Let me check the current state and continue clicking the next object in the chain.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'O', 'G', 'p'] and n['pixels'] > 5 and n['pixels'] < 100:
        center_r = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        center_c = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, center=({center_r},{center_c}), children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
